text:
Chibaba (チパパ, Chipapa) is a prizefighter in the Heavens Arena. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 6, Chapter 45 

Appearance

Chibaba has fair, spiky hair that is combed backward and narrow eyes. He wears a black shirt.

Plot

Heavens Arena arc

Chibaba makes a brief appearance on the 50th floor when he is scheduled to fight against Maita. They're weak in Killua's opinion. 

Battles

Manga Appearances

Trivia

Manga and Anime Differences

Chibaba doesn't appear or is mentioned in the 2011 anime series adaptation.
